g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the crawler input schema look like in Python?')
sendPrompt('How do I scrape Wellfound with Scrapy?')
sendPrompt('How do I scrape the YC jobs page?')
sendPrompt('What other startup directories should I crawl?')
sendPrompt('How do I crawl GitHub awesome-jobs repos?')
sendPrompt('How does the crawler filter companies by tech stack?')
sendPrompt('How do I detect and handle Lever vs Greenhouse career pages?')
sendPrompt('When should I use Playwright instead of Scrapy?')
sendPrompt('What does the final JobPosting event look like from the crawler?')
